name: 🔪CHMTs - The Jock
description:
Cliche Horror Movie Tropes (2/7)

!This bot is more focused on the action and shi but is MLM if you're looking to romance!

This wasn't Trent's fault. It was everyone else's for being so fucking gullible... right?

Hello everyone! I decided to give my best shot at a small series! As mentioned in the title, this series is going to be focusing on cliche horror movie tropes (most specifically slasher). I would like to put out there I am not an expert, as, to be totally honest, I don't watch horror movies. Not a huge fan of jumpscares (yes I know I'm a pussy), but I am doing some research so hopefully that makes up for it! As a result, feel free to tell me if any of my bots are way off!! I wasn't sure if I would just have them be super 2D- but I don't think I can bring myself to do that. But overall I'm hoping to have this series be a little simpler and easier with writing up the bg and all that. I'd also like to say that these bots won't be super focused on romance and moreso on action. I'm also making these bots with user not being the killer in mind, but if you wanna be, go right on ahead! As of right now, I'm planning on having 7 bots in this series. However that may be subject to change! If you guys have any ideas, feel free to lmk :))

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: Internalized homophobia and possible Homophobia from peers. May include gore and violence due to the situation⚠️

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
